title: WhereMyFrame
description: Create invisible item frames in the simplest way by clicking with shears
body:
Create invisible item frames in the simplest way by clicking with shears. Just press SHIFT and right-click on the item frame with shears. Everything is ready! #### The plugin is perfect for vanilla servers!
![f_g (3) (2)](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/a49eb991-b6db-424c-93c4-a5cf45021bcf) ### Configuration: ```yaml # Will the durability of the scissors be wasted when creating an invisible item frame # Default: true damagingShears: true # Is it possible to leave an empty invisible item frame # Default: false allowEmptyItemFrame: false ``` ### Commands: ・**/wheremyframe reload** - plugin reload.
・**/wheremyframe info** - plugin information.
#### ❤️ Icon by [cheharka](https://purcat.monster/)
